MICROSERVICE CATALOG (2.3.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:Download

License: GPL-3.0

Search API

file-availability-controller

Get file availability of all files of all input products

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/availability/files

Return a list of availability status of all files of all input products. List of all files must be less than a configured number of elements. Products not found will be excluded of the response.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
product_ids
required
Array of strings unique

list of urn of products

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "product_ids": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Get file availability of all files of input product

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/availability/files/{productId}

Return a list of availability status of all files of the input product. If the product is not found, the result will be empty.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
productId
required
string

Responses

complex-search-controller

searchDataObjects

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/complex/search
Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
dataTypes
Array of strings
Items Enum: "RAWDATA" "QUICKLOOK_SD" "QUICKLOOK_MD" "QUICKLOOK_HD" "DOCUMENT" "THUMBNAIL" "OTHER" "AIP" "DESCRIPTION"
page
integer <int32>
Array of objects (SearchRequest) [ 0 .. 100 ] items
size
integer <int32>

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "dataTypes": [
    • "RAWDATA"
    ],
  • "page": 0,
  • "requests": [
    • {
      • "datasetUrn": "string",
      • "engineType": "string",
      • "entityIdsToExclude": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "entityIdsToInclude": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "searchDateLimit": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "searchParameters": {
        • "all": {
          • "property1": "string",
          • "property2": "string"
          },
        • "empty": true,
        • "property1": [
          • "string"
          ],
        • "property2": [
          • "string"
          ]
        }
      }
    ],
  • "size": 0
}

engineType

catalog-download-controller

downloadFile

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/downloads/{aip_id}/files/{checksum}
Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
aip_id
required
string
checksum
required
string
query Parameters
acceptLicense
boolean
Default: false
isContentInline
boolean

search-engine-configuration-controller

/api/v1/rs-catalog/enginesconfig

query Parameters
engineType
string
required
object (Pageable)

createConf

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/enginesconfig

REGARDS_OAUTH2

required
required
object (PluginConfiguration)
object (Dataset)
datasetUrn
string
id
integer <int64>
label
required
string

fem-driver-controller

Schedule FEM Feature deletion

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/femdriver/features/delete

Schedule feature deletion on FEM microserice for each catalog entity matching given search request

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
datasetUrn
string
engineType
required
string
entityIdsToExclude
Array of strings [ 0 .. 1000 ] items
entityIdsToInclude
Array of strings [ 0 .. 1000 ] items
searchDateLimit
string <date-time>
object

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "datasetUrn": "string",
  • "engineType": "string",
  • "entityIdsToExclude": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "entityIdsToInclude": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "searchDateLimit": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "searchParameters": {
    • "all": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "empty": true,
    • "property1": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "property2": [
      • "string"
      ]
    }
}

Schedule FEM Feature notification

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/femdriver/features/notify

Schedule feature notification on FEM microserice for each catalog entity matching given search request

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
recipients
Array of strings unique

List of recipient(business identifiers) for direct notification

object (SearchRequest)

Contain feature seach request

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "recipients": [

}

file-restore-controller

Ask the restoration of all files of products.

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/restore

Ask the restoration of all files of products thanks to product identifiers (URN). List of all files must be less than a configured number of elements. Products not found will be excluded of the response.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Submission request dto to be processed.

product_ids
required
Array of strings unique

List product identifiers(URN) in order to restore their files

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "product_ids": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Ask the restoration of all files of one product.

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/restore/{product_id}

Ask the restoration of all files of one product thanks to its product identifier (URN).

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
product_id
required
string

Responses

catalog-services-controller

retrieveServices

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/services
Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
applicationModes
Array of strings
Items Enum: "ONE" "MANY"
datasetIpIds
Array of strings

Responses

applyService

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/services/{pluginConfigurationBusinessId}/apply
Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
pluginConfigurationBusinessId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object
entityType
string
Enum: "COLLECTION" "DATA" "DATASET"
object (SearchRequest)

Contain feature seach request

manager-controller

immediateShutdown

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/shutdown/immediate
Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2

Responses

core-controller

landing page

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac

Returns the root STAC Catalog or STAC Collection that is the entry point for users to browse with STAC Browser or for search engines to crawl. This can either return a single STAC Collection or more commonly a STAC catalog.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2

Responses

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "body": {
    • "conformsTo": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "description": "string",

ogc-features-controller

the feature collections in the dataset

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections

A body of Feature Collections that belong or are used together with additional links. Request may not return the full set of metadata per Feature Collection.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2

Responses

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json

describe the feature collection with id `collectionId`

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/{collectionId}

A single Feature Collection for the given collectionId. Request this endpoint to get a full list of metadata for the Feature Collection.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
collectionId
required
string

fetch features with get

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/{collectionId}/items

Fetch features of the collection with the given collectionId.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
collectionId
required
string
query Parameters
bbox
string
datetime
string
limit
integer <int32>
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1
query
string
sortby
string

fetch features with post

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/{collectionId}/items

Fetch features of the feature collection with the given collectionId.sort and query params have to be in the body of the request

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
collectionId
required
string
query Parameters
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (BBox)
object (ListString)
object (DateInterval)
object (Fields)
object (ListString)
object (IGeometry)
limit
integer <int32>
page
integer <int32>
object (MapStringQueryObject)
object (ListSortBy)

Responses

fetch a single feature

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/{collectionId}/items/{itemId}

Fetch the feature with id featureId in the feature collection with id collectionId.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
path Parameters
collectionId
required
string
itemId
required
string

collection-information-controller

Compute aggregated information for specified collections

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/information

For each collection and its item query parameters, aggregated information are computed so that the user can have a global view of the collection content

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
appendAuthParameters
boolean
object (ListCollectionFilters)

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appendAuthParameters": true,
  • "collections": {
    • "async": true,
    • "distinct": true,
    • "empty": true,
    • "lazy": true,
    • "memoized": true,
    • "orNull": {
      • "collectionId": "string",
      • "correlationId": "string",
      • "filters": {
        • "bbox": {
          • "maxX": 0.1,
          • "maxY": 0.1,
          • "minX": 0.1,
          • "minY": 0.1
          },
        • "collections": {
          • "async": true,
          • "distinct": true,
          • "empty": true,
          • "lazy": true,
          • "memoized": true,
          • "orNull": "string",
          • "ordered": true,
          • "sequential": true,
          • "singleValued": true,
          • "traversableAgain": true
          },

          • "from": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "singleDate": true,
          • "to": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          },
        • "ids": {
          • "async": true,
          • "distinct": true,
          • "empty": true,
          • "lazy": true,
          • "memoized": true,
          • "orNull": "string",
          • "ordered": true,
          • "sequential": true,
          • "singleValued": true,
          • "traversableAgain": true
          },
        • "intersects": {
          • "crs": "string",
          • "type": "Unlocated"
          },
        • "query": {
          • "async": true,
          • "distinct": true,
          • "empty": true,
          • "lazy": true,
          • "memoized": true,
          • "orNull": {
            • "_1": "string",
            • "_2": { }
            },
          • "ordered": true,
          • "sequential": true,
          • "singleValued": true,
          • "traversableAgain": true
          }
        }
      },
    • "ordered": true,
    • "sequential": true,
    • "singleValued": true,
    • "traversableAgain": true
    }
}

collection-search-controller

Search collection with simple filtering

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/search

Retrieve collection matching filters. Intended as a shorthand API for simple queries.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
bbox
string
object (ListString)
datetime
string
fields
string
object (ListString)
item_bbox
string
object (ListString)
item_datetime
string
object (ListString)
item_query
string
limit
integer <int32>
Default: 10
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1
query
string
sortby
string

Search collections with complex filtering using both collection and item query parameters

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/search

Retrieve collections matching filters. Full-featured query API.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (BBox)
object (ListString)
object (DateInterval)
object (Fields)
object (ListString)
object (IGeometry)
object (CollectionItemSearchBody)
limit
integer <int32>
page
integer <int32>
object (MapStringQueryObject)
object (ListSortBy)

Responses

  • Payload

application/json

  • "bbox": {
    • "maxX": 0.1,

continue to next/previous search collection page

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/search/paginate

Pagination for search in STAC is done through links, this endpoint provides the way to reuse the same search parameters but skip to an offset of results.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
collectionBody
required
string
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1

Return the collections timeline

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/collections/search/timeline

Search the timeline for each collection located in the request

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
appendAuthParameters
boolean
object (ListCollectionFilters)
from
string
mode
string
Enum: "BINARY" "BINARY_MAP" "HISTOGRAM" "HISTOGRAM_MAP" "ES_BINARY" "ES_BINARY_MAP" "ES_HISTOGRAM" "ES_HISTOGRAM_MAP" "ES_PARALLEL_BINARY" "ES_PARALLEL_BINARY_MAP" "ES_PARALLEL_HISTOGRAM" "ES_PARALLEL_HISTOGRAM_MAP"
timezone
string
to
string

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appendAuthParameters": true,
  • "collections": {
    • "async": true,
    • "distinct": true,
    • "empty": true,
    • "lazy": true,
    • "memoized": true,
    • "orNull": {
      • "collectionId": "string",
      • "correlationId": "string",

        • "bbox": {
          • "maxX": 0.1,

          • "minX": 0.1,
          • "minY": 0.1

          },

          • "async": true,

          },

conformance-controller

information about specifications that this API conforms to

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/conformance

A list of all conformance classes specified in a standard that the server conforms to.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2

collection-download-controller

Endpoint to download script for downloading all collection items

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/download/collections/script
Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
filename
string
Default: "regards.py"
tinyurl
required
string

Responses

Endpoint to download all collections as zip at once

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/download/collections/zip

Prepare NGINX mod_zip descriptor file to download all items of all collections at once

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
filename
string
Default: "regards.zip"
tinyurl
required
string

Responses

Compute information for downloading a set of collections as zip at once or one by one

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/download/collections/zip/prepare

For each collection and its item query parameters, a download link, the forecast download size and item number are given plus a link to download all at once

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
appendAuthParameters
boolean
object (ListCollectionFilters)

Responses

filename
string

tinyurl

string

item-search-controller

search with simple filtering

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/search

Retrieve Items matching filters. Intended as a shorthand API for simple queries.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
bbox
string
object (ListString)
datetime
string
fields
string
object (ListString)
limit
integer <int32>
Default: 10
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1
query
string
sortby
string

search with complex filtering

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/search

Retrieve Items matching filters. Full-featured query API.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (BBox)
object (ListString)
object (DateInterval)
object (Fields)
object (ListString)
object (IGeometry)
limit
integer <int32>
page
integer <int32>
object (MapStringQueryObject)
object (ListSortBy)

Responses

  • "bbox": {

    },

continue to next/previous search page

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/stac/search/paginate

Pagination for search in STAC is done through links, this endpoint provides the way to reuse the same search parameters but skip to an offset of results.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
query Parameters
itemBody
required
string
page
integer <int32>
Default: 1

search-validation-controller

Validate Geometry search parameter

Generated server url

/api/v1/rs-catalog/validation/geo

Validate that the given WKT Geometry is valid.

Authorizations:
REGARDS_OAUTH2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
wktString
required
string

Responses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "wktString": "string"
}
Edit this page
Previous
Apply catalog service
Next
Available plugins

A framework and a set of plugins to build scientific archives.

REGARDS is an Open Source data valorization product, highly flexible to various themes, modular, efficient, long-lasting, evolutionary and scalable, aims at providing services to Mission Centers and laboratories, and is able to deal with huge amount of data.
Our goal is to allow a strong commitment from user community in the development of modules and plugins.

We welcome your contributions to make these documents better.

Users

  • Manual

Developpers

  • Install
  • Web UI

More

  • GitHub
Copyright © 2026 REGARDS, OSS. Built with Docusaurus.
